claims.text: IncidentBridge reduces investigation time for product and platform teams.
support: 42 percent median reduction in investigation time across 3 paid pilots
claims.risk_if_overstated: Buyers may ask for broader proof across more team types and longer periods.

claims.text: IncidentBridge helps teams reconstruct incidents across product and infrastructure signals in one timeline.
support: Design partner feedback on fragmented evidence across tools
Product scope includes deploys, feature flags, logs, support tickets, and on-call actions
claims.risk_if_overstated: Message can blur into a broad observability promise if boundaries are not explicit.

claims.text: IncidentBridge is an incident investigation layer rather than a full observability suite.
support: Current product focus is post-alert investigation
Explicit company constraint excludes observability replacement
claims.risk_if_overstated: Category may still need explanation for buyers unfamiliar with the framing.

claims.text: IncidentBridge can replace current observability tooling.
claims.risk_if_overstated: Would create immediate credibility loss and pull the company into the wrong comparison set.
